meaning: adj.麦芽的,有麦芽的,<俚>喝醉的
examples: Cocoa dark, honey, malty, cocoa powder.
Tom was fool enough to malty that girl.
Dry, alcoholic, roasted, phenolic, mild coffee, caramellic, malty.
Our favourite: the Scottish-style Pike Kilt lifter, with a malty taste and a smoky finish.
For dessert, consider stouts, chocolate stouts, other beers with some malty thick sweetness, or possibly a fruit beer or spiced beer.
